directions_tried.name: SED harmonic oscillator reproduction
directions_tried.outcome: Position variance matches QM. UV-divergent velocity.

directions_tried.name: SED extension landscape survey
directions_tried.outcome: SED linearity boundary identified. Anharmonic oscillator as best target.

directions_tried.name: SED anharmonic oscillator
directions_tried.outcome: E003: Langevin fails O(β). E004: ALD fixes O(β), residual β^0.40. E005: β^0.40 is real. E006: F3 is main novel result. E007: ω³ spectrum confirmed as cause — only n=3 overshoots QM, all n<3 undershoots. Crossover n*≈2.61.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: UV-cutoff and τ scan for ALD residual
explorations_completed.key_finding: β^0.40 is REAL. Converges as τ^0.23 × ω_max^(-0.18).
F3 (ALD+residual) is main novel result. No prior numerical work.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Spectral noise comparison (n=0,1,2,3) to identify β^0.40 mechanism
explorations_completed.key_finding: H1 confirmed: ω³ ZPF uniquely causes positive Δe. n=2 undershoots. Crossover n*≈2.61. α≈0.25 (calibrated normalization).
